problem id: 549838a3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00011111 -> 00111110
  00001001 -> 00010010
  11000110 -> 10001010
  11001111 -> 10011000
  10011001 -> 00110110
  11001101 -> 10011100
  01111111 -> 11111101
  01011011 -> 10110100
  10110100 -> 01101101
  10100001 -> 01000111

query: 00010111
predicted answer: 00101110
